## Critical

### [3] Contract anxiety drag
*critical · domains: work* ^critical-1

Re-reading contracts saps an outsized share.

**Mechanism:** Avoidance loop.

**Implication:** Time/energy lost is real.

**Proposed actions:**
- set a hard timer on contract review

**Provenance:**
- **70% match**  [[2026-05-02T12-10-32Z-large/3-patterns/work#^constraint-1|Work Constraint 1]]: *"Re-reads everything."*
